title: Quivers for all - Recipe for Supplementaries Quiver
description: This Datapack gives the Supplementaries Quiver two recipes
body:
This adds two recipes as shown here:  
https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3843e3f79b4bde7f0af0287c7fecf3f1b1dffb2.png
If you have any other recipe suggestion or another quiver from another mod that can be added, feel free to leave a comment.
